Off Calendar Feb-11-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Bryan J. McCormack, Esq. of MCCORMACK LAW FIRM 440-6662, for petitioner Ovation Capital LLC, moving for approval Of Transfers Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. The Court, having reviewed parties' agreement and the proof of service of the moving paper, granted PETITIONER OVATION CAPITAL LLC's Petition For Approval Of Transfers Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
(DAG/301/JU) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
